action.reasoning: Observation: All 10 tasks verified; info keys match expected. Analysis: Per-task PPO models simpler to implement than multi-task; need training script with VecNormalize and per-task checkpoints. Decision: Write train.py for single-task training with small timesteps, loop over all 10 tasks (5000 steps each) to get baseline, modify predict.py to load per-task model+vecnorm, then submit eval to measure pipeline and baseline success_rate.
action.command: for task in h1hand-walk-v0 h1hand-stand-v0 h1hand-run-v0 h1hand-sit_simple-v0 h1hand-balance_simple-v0 h1hand-reach-v0 h1hand-push-v0 h1hand-pole-v0 h1hand-door-v0 h1hand-package-v0; do echo "=== Training $task ===" && python train.py --task $task --total_timesteps 5000 --seed 0; done
